page.html:
Hello I’m Shawon Ashraf. I’m a human being from Bangladesh. I graduated from North South University, Dhaka with a BS in Computer Science and Engineering Degree. I was an MSP(Microsoft Student Partner) from 2014-2017. I served in the MSP as a Campus Social Media Lead from 2015-2016 and as the Campus Lead from 2016-2017 and Vice Chair of NSU ACM Student Chapter from 2017-2018.

I love gaming, reading (almost anything!), travelling, photography, coding and eating(!). I spend most of my game time playing Overwatch and RPG games.

I was a long time Java guy, I still love Java though but these days I’m mostly after JS and Swift.

And I keep all my disastrous works on git, if you feel interested, have a look sometimes 🙂
